name: sentinel
purpose: Scan content for a named condition; returns TRIGGERED or CLEAR plus a brief explanation

task_description.description: The condition to scan for — be precise: what constitutes a trigger vs clear

output.description: TRIGGERED or CLEAR on line 1, followed by a 2-4 sentence explanation

input.task_description: Contains a mention of a price or dollar amount
input.injected_context: The new subscription costs $9.99 per month and includes all features.
